text:
Once upon a time in a land not so far away there lived a humble thief named Fred. Fred wasn’t naughty; he just loved stolen fruits and shiny things.

One autumn evening, Fred stole an exquisite old owl feather. It glowed blue like sapphire feathers ever evening.

You see, Fred liked owl lore. There was a legendary owl that could see into hearts.

You think you know someone?

That night Fred dreamt.

You love her.

Oh my.

You know everything. You know everything she thinks.

That's just silly.

That's just Fred.

He slept a good night!

The next day he gave it to a sparrow.

She was touched.

You made her day.

That owl had a big heart, after all.

That was a good thing.

Well.

That night he flew a gift across the sky.

You caught my eye.

But I have great wings.

Oh.

That was very nice of you.

He couldn’t fly close.

You were scared.

You’ll
